title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: the easiest way to run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other open-source LLMs locally with a single CLI or Docker container.

title: langchain-ai/langchain
summary: LangChain’s Ollama integration lets you plug any local model served by Ollama into chains, agents, retrieval pipelines and more.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client for Ollama: chat, generate, pull, push and manage models with async support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official Ollama JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node, Deno and browsers (via proxy).

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI that talks to any Ollama model with multi-chat, code highlighting, PDF upload and RAG.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API, streaming and embedding support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Plug-and-play retrieval-augmented generation template that combines Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rich interactive CLI for chatting, managing models and monitoring GPU/CPU stats.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin for code generation, explanation and chat via Ollama with optional streaming.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated Modelfile recipes for CodeLlama, Zephyr, SQLCoder, Vicuna and more.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that brings local LLM summarization, brainstorming and Q&A to your vault.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that chats, generates images (via SD) and moderates using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Slack bot server that proxies Slack messages to Ollama and streams replies back.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app with session memory, model selector and token-throughput metrics.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama with tokio, serde and native streaming support.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django REST API template that exposes Ollama completions with JWT auth and Swagger docs.

title: ollama-qt
summary: Cross-platform desktop GUI for Ollama written in Qt6 with chat history export.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot that offers group and private chat with any Ollama model and optional voice replies.
